query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN components IS NOT NULL AND components != '[]' AND components != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_components FROM final_recipes;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AQnpkq2FC6cpfGo.root --database UyJAnBG4RdjFPnrCDJUrf4 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN components IS NOT NULL AND components != '[]' AND components != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_components FROM final_recipes;
